name: Scandanavian Salmon Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Coat a small souffle dish with non-stick spray.
2. In a bowl, break the bread into small pieces.
3. Mix in the remaining ingredients until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared souffle dish.
5. Bake for 35 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
